temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) Two men are seated in an office. The man on the left wears a formal police uniform with a black tie and a stern, unblinking expression. The man on the right, in a light-colored dress shirt and striped tie, looks down with a troubled and weary expression, his head slightly bowed. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and serious atmosphere, introducing two key characters who appear to be in a difficult or stressful situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, ambient room tone.)
(00:04-00:07) The man in the light-colored shirt looks up and to his right, speaking with a sense of resignation and concern. He confirms that they are being followed by CIB. (Storyline: The dialogue reveals the central conflict: the characters are aware of being monitored by a specific unit (CIB), which explains their tense demeanor.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, concerned. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
